today_trades.rationale: OVERBOUGHT REVERSAL (Pattern A, BULL regime). RSI 94.8 — extreme overbought, one of the highest readings seen. BB %B 1.01 = price breaching upper Bollinger Band. CEO transition news (Cook → Ternus) is positive but fully priced — UBS merely raised PT to $287 (neutral rating). MACD hist +0.55 shows momentum still positive but this level of RSI extension is unsustainable intraday. Price $270.51 at session VWAP ($270.69) — acceptable short entry zone. Earnings 4/30 (>24h away, no blackout). SKEW=140 confirms institutional downside hedging. Tech sector DECELERATING today (-2.32%). ATR = $1.19, so 2.5x ATR stop ~$3.00 above entry → SL ~$273.50, TP ~$267.50 (reversion to SMA20 $268.19 area). Expected hold: 3-5h through closing hour momentum. Target exit by 3:45 PM ET. CAVEAT: Our AAPL history is 0/3 WR — sizing at lower end (half-size) accordingly.

Defensive sector rotation play. Consumer Staples ACCELERATING (+1.36% today, +1.98% 5D, +1.93% 20D — consistent strength). MACD just crossed bullish (hist +0.097), RSI 63.5 (healthy, not overbought), above SMA20 ($82.82) and SMA50 ($83.05). Consumer confidence beat today (92.8 vs 89.0 est) provides macro tailwind for consumer-oriented ETFs. Price $83.42 above VWAP $83.18 — slightly extended but only +0.29%. Tech rotation into defensives with XLK down -2.32% supports the thesis. ATR $0.32, 2.5x ATR stop ~$0.79 below entry → SL ~$82.63, TP ~$84.20. Expected hold: 3-5h. Uncorrelated with AAPL short (different sectors). Exit by 3:50 PM ET.
